name: python3-django
title: python3-django
description:
High-level Python web development framework
Django is a high-level web application framework that loosely follows the
model-view-controller design pattern.
.
Python's equivalent to Ruby on Rails, Django lets you build complex
data-driven websites quickly and easily - Django focuses on automating as much
as possible and adhering to the "Don't Repeat Yourself" (DRY) principle.
.
Django additionally emphasizes reusability and "pluggability" of components;
many generic third-party "applications" are available to enhance projects or
to simply to reduce development time even further.
.
Notable features include:
* An object-relational mapper (ORM)
* Automatic admin interface
* Elegant URL dispatcher
* Form serialization and validation system
* Templating system
* Lightweight, standalone web server for development and testing
* Internationalization support
* Testing framework and client

command_examples: django-admin  is  Django's  command-line utility for administrative tasks.  This document out-
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use django-admin because High-level Python web development framework.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use django-admin as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `django-admin  is  Django's  command-line utility for administrative tasks.  This document out-` as documented upstream for django-admin.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `django-admin <command> [options]` as documented upstream for django-admin.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `django-admin check [app_label [app_label ...]]` as documented upstream for django-admin.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `django-admin check --tag models --tag compatibility` as documented upstream for django-admin.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair django-admin with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `django-admin --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

examples: django-admin  is  Django's  command-line utility for administrative tasks.  This document out-
documentation.readme: django-admin - Utility script for the Django web framework django-admin is Django's command-line utility for administrative tasks. This document out- lines all it can do. In addition, manage.py is automatically created in each Django project. It does the same thing as django-admin but also sets the DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE environment variable so that it points to your project's settings.py file. The django-admin script should be on your system path if you installed Django via pip. If it's not in your path, ensure you have your virtual environment activated. Generally, when working on a single Django project, it's easier to use manage.py than django-admin. If you need to switch between multipl
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install python-django. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `django-admin  is  Django's  command-line utility for administrative tasks.  This document out-`. Further invocations from upstream: `django-admin <command> [options]`; `django-admin check [app_label [app_label ...]]`. High-level Python web development framework.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: High-level Python web development framework.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: django-admin - Utility script for the Django web framework django-admin is Django's command-line utility for administrative tasks. This document out- lines all it can do. In addition, manage.py is automatically created in each Django project. It does the same thing as django-admin but also sets the DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE environment variable so that it points to your project's settings.py file. Th.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install python-django
Install with: sudo apt install python-django
